news.title: UIC historian Jane Rhodes elected to the American Antiquarian Society
news.summary_en: Rhodes was recognized for her outstanding contributions to academic and public life.

news.title: Neuropsychiatric Institute facade restoration project nears completion
news.summary_en: Restoration work at the historic site is expected to be completed in July.

news.title: UIC celebrates 2026 spring commencement May 6-9
news.summary_en: Chicago’s largest public university to award about 6,600 degrees.

news.title: UI Health earns “A” for hospital safety from The Leapfrog Group
news.summary_en: The grade recognizes UI Health for commitment to patient safety.

news.title: How 3 exceptional spring grads made their mark at UIC
news.summary_en: Read about three of the more than 6,000 UIC students who will graduate May 6-9.

news.title: Margarita Arango: Turning academic excellence into public impact
news.summary_en: Arango was president of the Student Advocacy Coalition, ambassador for her college and now its commencement speaker.

news.title: What UIC students added to Housing Museum’s archives
news.summary_en: UIC Honors College class interviewed public housing residents about their lives.

news.title: UIC Athletics spotlights top performers at annual SPARKYS
news.summary_en: All-sports gala honored standout achievements from the 2025-26 season.

news.title: Emily Manzo: Leading with purpose and vision
news.summary_en: Urban education senior helped restart campus powwow, bringing together UIC’s Native American community.

news.title: Big Brothers Big Sisters linked to lower violence and substance use among youth
news.summary_en: UIC study tracks youth outcomes over four years across 13 states.
